title: Mobregon's Default
description: A texturepack for the Youtuber Mobregon.
body:
A texturepack for the Youtuber Mobregon.  Has some slight GUI tweaks but keeps to the vanilla feel that Mobregon prefers and has no major texture changes but it does come with:

- Low Fire
- No Explosion Particles
- End Crystal Retexture
- GUI Tweaks
- Better Fishing Rod Bobber
- No Pumpkin Blur
And More!
